description:
Parent epic: V3 E3: Context and typed results

Source task 3/8 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Refine the naming distinction between context, agent state, memory, and
  compaction.

Epic closure criteria:
- new users can pass a naked map first and add schema later
- typed results are stable enough for app code
- context/result docs avoid conflating state, memory, and output

comments.text: Refined vocabulary for context, agent state, memory, compaction, and result in README, FEATURES, and the Jidoka.Agent moduledoc. Docs now distinguish per-turn app inputs from runtime process state, recalled facts, transcript windowing, and app-facing return values.

title: E3: Refine the naming distinction between context, agent state, memory, and compaction
